shortcuts: Ctrl+Shift+M close · Ctrl+Alt+Z release · Ctrl+Shift+Q quit
fit.title: View fit
fit.help: Fit: keeps aspect · Stretch: fills the window · 1:1: source pixels
chat.empty: No messages in this session yet
files.help: Click a folder: enter · → send · ↓ download ("Pulsar Received")
hint.click: Click the screen to take control
info.pacing: Frame pacing: buffers 1-2 frames to smooth network/decode jitter and presents at a steady cadence. On = smoother (adds a little latency), Off = lowest latency.
info.quality: Low latency: the encoder favors speed (for gaming). Quality: better picture at the same bandwidth, slightly more latency.
info.call: Voice call: opens your microphone to the host and the host's audio to you (two-way audio).
info.statshud: Shows a small fps/latency strip at the top of the screen even while the overlay is closed.
info.ovbtn: A small draggable button on the video that opens the overlay (Parsec-style).
